title: astraea hauthalii
intro: Astraea hauthalii, also known as the Astraea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Astraea hauthalii include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and cuts. Astraea hauthalii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
